events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
events.description: The 23rd FIFA World Cup, hosted jointly by USA, Canada, and Mexico. 48 teams will compete across 16 cities.

predictions.if_happens: Massive tourism boost across North America (~$5B revenue), infrastructure upgrades completed, global attention on US-Mexico-Canada relations
predictions.if_not: Severe economic loss for host cities, diplomatic embarrassment, FIFA credibility crisis

events.title: Trump State Visit to China
events.description: US President Trump's state visit to China for diplomatic talks on trade, Taiwan, and bilateral relations.

predictions.if_happens: Potential tariff reduction agreements, Taiwan Strait tensions easing, US-China trade normalization signals, global markets rally
predictions.if_not: Continued trade war escalation, Taiwan crisis risk increases, supply chain disruptions persist, markets volatility rises

events.title: G7 Summit 2026
events.description: Annual G7 summit bringing together leaders of the world's seven largest advanced economies.

predictions.if_happens: Coordinated sanctions policy, AI governance framework, climate finance commitments, Ukraine aid packages
predictions.if_not: Fragmented Western response to global challenges, policy vacuum on AI regulation, weakened multilateralism

events.title: NATO Summit 2026
events.description: Annual NATO summit discussing collective defense, Ukraine support, and alliance expansion.

predictions.if_happens: Defense spending targets reaffirmed, Ukraine long-term support package, new member integration progress, China policy statement
predictions.if_not: Alliance credibility weakened, Ukraine support uncertain, defense spending gaps persist, Russia emboldened

events.title: UN General Assembly 81st Session
events.description: The 81st session of the United Nations General Assembly, featuring speeches from world leaders.

predictions.if_happens: Global diplomatic breakthroughs possible, climate commitments renewed, multilateral institutions reinforced
predictions.if_not: Diplomatic vacuum, unilateral actions increase, global governance weakened

events.title: PM Modi State Visit to US
events.description: Indian Prime Minister Modi's state visit to the United States for bilateral talks on defense, technology, and trade.

predictions.if_happens: Defense deals signed, tech cooperation expanded, QUAD alliance strengthened, India as counterbalance to China solidified
predictions.if_not: India-Russia ties deepen, US Indo-Pacific strategy weakened, tech transfer delays

events.title: G20 Summit 2026
events.description: G20 summit bringing together leaders of the world's largest economies to discuss global economic governance.

predictions.if_happens: Global tax reform progress, debt relief for developing nations, climate finance pledges, digital currency framework
predictions.if_not: Economic fragmentation accelerates, developing nations debt crisis deepens, global South disillusionment grows

events.title: US Midterm Elections
events.description: Elections for all 435 House seats and 35 of 100 Senate seats.

predictions.if_happens: Shift in congressional power affects legislative agenda, trade policy direction, Supreme Court nominations, Ukraine aid
predictions.if_not: Status quo governance continues, bipartisan deals harder, 2028 presidential race begins in earnest

events.title: Xi Jinping EU Summit
events.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping's visit to Europe for China-EU summit on trade, climate, and geopolitical tensions.

predictions.if_happens: EU-China trade tensions ease, EV tariff negotiations progress, climate cooperation deepens, Russia-Ukraine mediation attempts
predictions.if_not: EU de-risks from China accelerates, trade barriers increase, European companies lose China market access

events.title: COP33 Climate Summit
events.description: The 33rd UN Climate Change Conference of the Parties.

predictions.if_happens: New emission targets set, climate finance pledges renewed, loss and damage fund operationalized, carbon market rules finalized
predictions.if_not: Climate action falls behind Paris Agreement goals, vulnerable nations left without support, green transition delays

events.title: Davos World Economic Forum
events.description: Annual meeting of global political and business leaders in Davos to discuss pressing global issues.

predictions.if_happens: Public-private partnerships announced, AI governance frameworks debated, global economic outlook shaped, ESG commitments reinforced
predictions.if_not: Elite disconnect from public grows, corporate sustainability backtracks, global coordination vacuum

events.title: London Ukraine Peace Summit
events.description: International summit in London to discuss Ukraine peace framework and post-war reconstruction.

predictions.if_happens: Ceasefire framework outlined, reconstruction fund established, security guarantees discussed, Russia isolation deepens
predictions.if_not: War continues indefinitely, reconstruction planning stalls, refugee crisis prolongs, European security deteriorates

events.title: Japan-South Korea Summit
events.description: Bilateral summit between Japan and South Korea leaders on trade, security, and historical issues.

predictions.if_happens: Trade restrictions lifted, semiconductor supply chain stabilized, North Korea coordination strengthened, historical reconciliation progress
predictions.if_not: Trade disputes persist, chip supply vulnerable, North Korea threat uncoordinated, US alliance triangle weakened

events.title: China PLA Anniversary Military Parade
events.description: China's People's Liberation Army anniversary, potentially featuring military parade and weapons showcase.

predictions.if_not: Low-key celebration, tensions ease slightly, diplomatic window opens

events.title: Brazil Municipal Elections

predictions.if_not: Political uncertainty continues, investor confidence wavers, environmental policy in limbo

events.title: NASA Artemis III Moon Mission
events.description: NASA's crewed mission to land astronauts on the Moon's south pole, the first crewed lunar landing since Apollo 17.

predictions.if_happens: Historic achievement, lunar water ice exploration begins, space industry boom, Artemis Accords strengthened, China space race intensifies
predictions.if_not: Program delays erode confidence, SpaceX Starship timeline affected, China gains lunar advantage, NASA budget pressure

events.title: SpaceX Starship Full Orbital Flight
events.description: SpaceX's first full orbital flight of Starship with successful booster catch and payload deployment.

predictions.if_happens: Space launch costs drop dramatically, Starlink V2 deployment accelerates, NASA Artemis timeline improves, commercial space boom
predictions.if_not: Further delays to Mars timeline, NASA dependent on SLS, competitors gain ground, investor patience tested

events.title: China Shenzhou Crew Rotation
events.description: China's crewed mission to rotate Tiangong space station crew.

predictions.if_happens: China space program advances, Tiangong operations mature, potential international cooperation, space race narrative intensifies
predictions.if_not: Program setback, international confidence in China space wavers, ISS remains sole major station

events.title: Perseid Meteor Shower
events.description: One of the most prolific meteor showers, producing up to 100 meteors per hour at peak.

predictions.if_happens: Major skywatching event, tourism boost for dark-sky locations, media coverage drives space interest
predictions.if_not: Weather obscures view, missed educational opportunity

events.title: Geminid Meteor Shower
events.description: The Geminids are one of the best meteor showers, producing up to 120 multicolored meteors per hour.

predictions.if_happens: Best meteor shower of the year, major skywatching event
predictions.if_not: Winter weather obscures viewing in Northern Hemisphere
